name: override-table-style-font-jc
description: FancyTableStyle has jc=center, sz=28 (14pt). Normal style has default jc=left, sz=22 (11pt). No overrideTableStyleFontSizeAndJustification compat setting.
expected_behavior: Default behavior (compat setting false/absent): Normal's 11pt font and left jc do NOT override table style. Table cells should render center-aligned at 14pt.
current_status: GAP — we don't parse or respect compat settings
